overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban commercial district. The player character walks through covered walkways, past street vendors, crosses busy streets with elevated metro tracks, and enters a bar called 'Time Machine' with vibrant interior lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway beneath elevated structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in teal top walking away from camera

entered.detail: large blue billboard with red star logo and white text
metal beam ceiling with fluorescent lighting creating partial cover
blue and purple neon signs on the left wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian walkway with overhead neon signs including a large CIRRUS billboard. The area is semi-enclosed with concrete flooring and scattered pedestrians walking in opposing directions beneath metal beam structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional vendor area with food stalls under partial cover

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with BD SHACK sign becoming visible

agents.ego_description: passing food vendors on the left while approaching the open plaza exit

entered.detail: wooden food vendor stall with warm overhead lighting and green stools
large red neon sign reading BD SHACK Fuyutsuki with figure logo

segments.scene_description: Passing food vendor stalls on the left while transitioning from the covered walkway to an open plaza area. The BD SHACK Fuyutsuki neon sign becomes visible in the distance as the covered roof structure recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with neon signage and vehicle traffic

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street with vehicles passing by in both directions

agents.ego_description: navigating through the open plaza past glowing barriers and crossing the busy street

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving past on the street

entered.detail: illuminated pink and white barrier walls lining the BD SHACK patio
large elevated highway or metro structure with metal trusses overhead
corner building with art deco neon trim and TIME MACHINE signage

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open plaza past the glowing pink barriers of BD SHACK, then crossing a busy city street with moderate vehicle traffic. The elevated metro track structure dominates the right side while the Time Machine building becomes visible ahead on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk approaching the Time Machine bar entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward the Time Machine entrance with steady pace

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: art deco style neon lettering spelling TIME MACHINE on building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along the urban sidewalk toward the Time Machine bar, passing other pedestrians. The street runs parallel on the right with sparse traffic, while the neon-lit facade of the destination building grows larger on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior of Time Machine bar with neon ambient lighting

events.description: enters the Time Machine bar through the front entrance doors

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance into the dimly lit bar interior

notable_agents.action: patron in white jacket walking ahead into the bar interior

entered.detail: dimly lit bar space with red and purple ambient lighting
colorful neon tube lights arranged in wave patterns on the ceiling
long bar counter with stools and illuminated edges

segments.scene_description: Entering the Time Machine bar through the front entrance, transitioning from the outdoor urban environment to the dimly lit interior space with colorful neon wave lights on the ceiling and a bar counter visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit commercial district that transitions from a sheltered pedestrian corridor into the vibrant interior of a themed bar. It begins beneath the metal beams and glowing billboards of a covered walkway, moving past scattered pedestrians and a large Cirrus sign. As the camera passes food vendor stalls, the roof structure recedes to open into a wide plaza where the pink glow of BD Shack becomes visible. The scene then shifts across a busy city street dominated by an elevated metro track, moving along the sidewalk as the neon facade of the Time Machine bar grows larger on the left. Finally, the camera crosses the threshold of the entrance, leaving the urban street behind to enter a dimly lit interior defined by colorful neon wave lights and a distant bar counter.
